title: Lionel Messi: 2022 redemption
body: Lionel Messi arrived at the 2022 World Cup already regarded as one of the greatest players in the history of the game, yet still missing the one prize that had eluded him: the World Cup itself. Lifting the trophy in Qatar, in what he had signalled would be his last, was widely read as the final piece of his legacy.

title: Argentina-Brazil rivalry
body: The rivalry between Argentina and Brazil is one of the fiercest in international football, born of decades of contested South American supremacy and carried through the eras of Pele, Maradona, and Messi. A match between the two is treated as a national event in both countries, its weight extending well beyond the scoreline.
